summary_en: 2,770,100 shares acquired (0.39% of shares outstanding as of Sep 30, 2025) for ¥63.57B. Cumulative progress: 18.5% of ¥150B authorization, 15.4% of 18M share limit. Acquisition window: Nov 4, 2025–Oct 28, 2026. Open-market method (Tokyo Stock Exchange).
title_en: Notice Regarding Status of Acquisition of Treasury Shares
translation_en_brief: Advantest Corporation filed a progress report on its share buyback program on May 29, 2026. As of that date, the company had acquired 2,770,100 shares at a total cost of ¥63.57 billion since the program commenced on November 4, 2025. This represents 18.5% of the authorized ¥150 billion upper limit and 15.4% of the 18 million share cap. The authorization was approved by the board on October 28, 2025, and covers the period through October 28, 2026. All purchases are executed via open-market trading on the Tokyo Stock Exchange. The shares acquired (0.39% of shares outstanding as of September 30, 2025) are ordinary shares of the company, and the cost excludes trading fees.
